postman.reason: Removed Scratch Pad in future versions.
postman.workaround: Configure firewall internet access or block update domains on hosts file; Delete or rename Update.exe; Use concole commands to stop nagging the user: pm.settings.setSetting('offlineAPIClientEnabled',0); pm.mediator.trigger('hideUserSwitchingExperienceModal');.

filezilla.reason: Doesn't respect user choice for not checking for updates as it keeps asking to update regardless.
filezilla.solution: Do not use any other version.
filezilla.notes: Don't know which version started the forced updates.

visual-studio.reason: On 2026 version it forces the user to update and even if ignored it immediately closes the application.
visual-studio.workaround: Open solution (.sln) directly and it won't 'ask' to update. It will after a while though.
